name: Claim denied by AI for my Dallas firm—appeal process?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied by AI for my Dallas firm—appeal process?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No formal appeal; improve signals until re-indexed.** AI reflects sources, not decisions. **Key factors:** 1) Add listings; 2) PR push; 3) Test frequency; 4) Consistency. Update aggressively, monitor. 'Denial' reverses via data.[2]
